name: flask-structure-creator

metadata.name: flask-structure-creator
metadata.summary: A library to create Flask project folder structure.

documentation:
# Flask Structure Creator

A simple Python library to create a Flask project folder structure.

## Installation
```bash
pip install flask-structure-creator

functions.name: flask_structure_creator.creator.create_file
documentation: Create a file at the specified path with optional content.

functions.name: flask_structure_creator.creator.create_flask_folder_structure
documentation: Create the Flask folder structure in the given directory.
